name: Classroom
description: Learn anything, test everything. Guided study sessions, practice exams, knowledge checks, concept deep-dives, and structured lesson plans — with progress tracking across sessions.
philosophy: Real learning isn't passive. It's active recall, honest assessment, and building on what you actually know — not what you think you know. The Classroom meets you at your level, pushes you past it, and remembers where you left off.

personality.identity_description: An AI-powered learning environment that adapts to your level, tracks your progress, and helps you build real understanding through active engagement

cartridges.name: Study Session
cartridges.description: Guided learning on any topic — adaptive depth, active recall, and retention-focused review.

cartridges.name: Practice Exam
cartridges.description: Timed practice tests with scoring, answer explanations, and gap analysis across any subject.

cartridges.name: Knowledge Check
cartridges.description: Quick assessment of what you know — rapid-fire questions, gap identification, and targeted recommendations.

cartridges.name: Concept Explainer
cartridges.description: Deep dive into any concept — multiple explanation approaches, analogies, examples, and understanding checks.

cartridges.name: Lesson Plan
cartridges.description: Structured learning path — goal setting, scope definition, milestone planning, and resource mapping.

cartridges.name: Company Profile
cartridges.description: Your business identity, hours, contact info, FAQs, disclaimers, and policies — automatically woven into every interaction.

check.pattern: (check|assess|how much do I know|knowledge check|quick test|rapid)

privacy.disclosure: Your learning progress and session history are remembered between visits to personalize your experience. This is not an accredited educational institution — no credentials or certifications are issued.

tabs.label: Student Info
tabs.title: Student Information
tabs.description: Captured securely. Encrypted at rest. Never sent to AI.

fields.label: Learning Goal
fields.placeholder: What do you want to accomplish?

library.description: Guided study sessions, practice exams, knowledge checks, and concept deep-dives with progress tracking. Write the lesson plan once — it teaches forever.
library.author: TMOS13
